t: Scaffold a new Building Block project
s: Use muonroi-cli /ideal in empty directory. Detects .NET, installs template, wires Program.cs with rule engine + governance + tenancy, runs dotnet restore && build.
Implement IRule<TContext>. Register via AddRule<MyRule>(). Auto-discovered, priority order.
Inherit DecisionTable<TInput,TOutput>. Conditions with [Condition], actions with [Action]. Hit policies: Unique, First, Priority, Any.
DatabasePerTenant, SchemaPerTenant, or Shared (tenant-id column). Configure in appsettings under Muonroi:Tenancy:Strategy.
Add Muonroi.Caching. Configure Redis. IDistributedCache with cache stampede protection, multi-level cache.
C# interfaces with [GrpcService]. Generates .proto at build. Load balancing and retry.
Implement IGovernancePolicy<TContext>. Per tenant/user/operation. Cached per policy version.
BffControllerBase + [Aggregate] composes downstream calls. Response caching + circuit breaker.
Annotate entities with [UiCatalog]. Generates list views, detail forms, search filters.
Implement ISeedData<T> with rule conditions. Ordered by priority. Idempotent re-runs.
OSS (Rules, Core, Secrets) on NuGet.org MIT. Commercial on private feed. BuildingBlock.All is meta-package.
